explanation: Tường thuật câu hỏi Yes/No: thêm 'if/whether', lùi thì ('will' -> 'would', 'come' -> 'came') và đổi đại từ ('you' -> 'I').
options: Quang asked me if I will visit the Love Valley when I come to Da Lat.
Quang asked me if he would visit the Love Valley when he came to Da Lat.
Quang asked me if he will visit the Love Valley when he comes to Da Lat.
Quang asked me if I would visit the Love Valley when I came to Da Lat.
question: “Will you visit the Love Valley when you come to Da Lat?” Quang asked me.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the original sentence in the following question.

explanation: Câu hỏi Wh- ở gián tiếp không đảo ngữ trợ động từ, lùi thì (hiện tại hoàn thành & quá khứ đơn -> quá khứ hoàn thành) và đổi trạng thời gian (last night -> the previous night).
options: She asked him where he has been since he left the party the previous night.
She asked him where he had been since he left the party last night.
She asked him where he had been since he had left the party the previous night.
She asked him where had he been since he left the party the night before.
question: “Where have you been since you left the party last night?” she asked him.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the original sentence in the following question.

explanation: Tường thuật câu hỏi chứa mệnh đề điều kiện loại 1: lùi thì ('will' -> 'would', 'have' -> 'had'), đổi 'this' -> 'that', 'tomorrow' -> 'the following day'.
options: The manager asked the employee if he will help her with this project if he has free time the next day.
The manager asked the employee if he would help her with that project if he had free time the following day.
The manager asked the employee whether he would help her with that project if he had free time tomorrow.
The manager asked the employee if would he help her with that project if he had free time the following day.
question: “Will you help me with this project if you have free time tomorrow?” the manager asked the employee.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the original sentence in the following question.

explanation: Cấu trúc đề nghị 'Why don't we + V' thường được tường thuật bằng 'suggest + V-ing', đồng thời cần đổi đại từ chỉ thị 'this' thành 'that'.
options: John suggested complaining to the company about that poor service.
John asked why we don't complain to the company about that poor service.
John suggested that they should complain to the company about this poor service.
John advised us to complain to the company about that poor service.
question: “Why don't we complain to the company about this poor service?” said John.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the original sentence in the following question.

explanation: Lùi thì quá khứ tiếp diễn thành quá khứ hoàn thành tiếp diễn, quá khứ đơn thành quá khứ hoàn thành, và đổi 'yesterday' thành 'the day before'.
options: The police officer asked the man if he was driving his car when the accident happened the day before.
The police officer asked the man if he had been driving his car when the accident happened yesterday.
The police officer asked the man if he had been driving his car when the accident had happened the day before.
The police officer asked the man whether had he been driving his car when the accident happened the previous day.
question: “Were you driving your car when the accident happened yesterday?” the police officer asked the man.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the original sentence in the following question.

explanation: Tường thuật câu hỏi đuôi xử lý tương tự như câu hỏi Yes/No bình thường, cần lùi thì (hiện tại hoàn thành -> quá khứ hoàn thành) và bỏ hẳn phần câu hỏi đuôi.
options: The teacher asked me whether I hadn't finished the assignment yet, hadn't I.
The teacher asked me if I had finished the assignment yet.
The teacher asked me if I haven't finished the assignment yet.
The teacher asked me that I hadn't finished the assignment yet.
question: “You haven't finished the assignment yet, have you?” the teacher asked me.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the original sentence in the following question.

explanation: Khi tường thuật câu hỏi có 'must' mang nghĩa bắt buộc, ta chuyển 'must' thành 'had to', nhớ đổi 'this' thành 'that' và đưa về trật tự câu khẳng định.
options: The accountant asked the director whether he had to submit this financial report by Friday.
The accountant asked the director if he had to submit that financial report by Friday.
The accountant asked the director if he must submit this financial report by Friday.
The accountant asked the director if must he submit that financial report by Friday.
question: “Must I submit this financial report by Friday?” the accountant asked the director.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the original sentence in the following question.

explanation: Tường thuật 2 câu hỏi liên tiếp có thể nối bằng 'and', đảm bảo lùi thì, đổi đại từ tân ngữ ('us' -> 'them') và trả về trật tự câu khẳng định không đảo ngữ.
options: She asked her friend who was that man and why was he looking at them.
She asked her friend who that man is and why he is looking at them.
She asked her friend who that man was and why he was looking at us.
She asked her friend who that man was and why he was looking at them.
question: “Who is that man? Why is he looking at us?” she asked her friend.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the original sentence in the following question.

explanation: Động từ khiếm khuyết trong cấu trúc 'should have + V3/ed' (chỉ sự nuối tiếc/phân vân trong quá khứ) được giữ nguyên dạng khi chuyển sang câu gián tiếp.
options: He wondered whether he should have told her the truth about the accident.
He asked himself whether should he have told her the truth about the accident.
He wondered if he had to tell her the truth about the accident.
He wondered if he should tell her the truth about the accident.
question: “Should I have told her the truth about the accident?” he asked himself.
instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the original sentence in the following question.

explanation: Cần lùi thì cả hai mệnh đề (quá khứ đơn -> quá khứ hoàn thành), đổi 'two days ago' -> 'two days before', và biến đổi chính xác các đại từ (you -> she, I -> he).
options: The boss asked his secretary whether she had seen the latest email he had sent her two days ago.
The boss asked his secretary if had she seen the latest email he had sent her two days before.
The boss asked his secretary if she saw the latest email he sent her two days before.
The boss asked his secretary if she had seen the latest email he had sent her two days before.
question: “Did you see the latest email I sent you two days ago?” the boss asked his secretary.
